title: Horizon redress schemes: independent reports on scheme progress
body: "This page contains independent reports on redress for postmasters impacted by the Post Office Horizon Scandal. Written by Dentons, these reports detail the progress of claims in the Group Litigation Order (GLO) Compensation Scheme, the Horizon Convictions Redress Scheme and the Horizon Shortfall Scheme Appeals process.  Reports published prior to 30 September 2025 cover the GLO Compensation Scheme only.  Information about amounts paid out for all Horizon schemes is available separately on GOV.UK.  Reports for Horizon financial redress administered by Post Office Limited can be found on the Post Office website.  "
